dfuGuide.title: Hold Fn + 5 for 5 seconds
dfuGuide.detail: Press and hold Fn + number 5 for about 5 seconds. The keyboard will disconnect automatically after it enters DFU mode.

dfuGuide.title: Open the DFU folder
dfuGuide.detail: On macOS, open Finder and look for the 'Nocfree &' disk. On Windows, the folder may open automatically after the device disconnects and reconnects.

dfuGuide.title: Drag the downloaded file into the folder
dfuGuide.detail: Download the firmware that matches your current keyboard country layout, then drag that file into the opened DFU folder to start the update.

dfuGuide.title: Reconnect after the update
dfuGuide.detail: After the firmware update finishes, reconnect the keyboard and it will be ready to use again.
